notes: Exported Lumos review campaign for NetSuite. 47 users reviewed. 3 revocations.
Coupa review campaign. 31 users. 1 revocation (departed contractor).
Anaplan review. 12 users. All approved. Small user population.
Lumos campaign covered Okta-provisioned users. Had to manually cross-reference 8 direct Snowflake accounts not managed through Okta. Very time-consuming.
Exported admin role list from Okta admin console. 14 admin accounts. All justified.
NetSuite admin console doesn't have a clean export. Screenshots of admin user list with role details. 6 admins.

control_description: Privileged access review — GitHub org owners
notes: Exported org owner list from GitHub Enterprise settings. 8 org owners. 1 flagged as no longer needing owner access — downgraded.
Had to manually audit IAM users across 3 AWS accounts. No automated tooling. Incomplete — root account review not documented. Became audit finding.
Sampled 25 production PRs. For each: screenshot of Jira ticket showing approval + screenshot of GitHub showing PR review + merge. 50 screenshots total. Extremely tedious.
NetSuite customization log doesn't export cleanly. Screenshots of 10 customization changes with associated approval tickets.
Exported all NetSuite role assignments. Manually verified no user has both entry and approval permissions. Built matrix in spreadsheet. 89 users checked.
Coupa approval chain export. Verified separation between requisitioners and approvers. 45 users checked.
Ran SoD test: logged in as entry-only user and attempted to approve a PO. System correctly blocked. Screenshots of attempt and error.
Cross-referenced 18 terminations from Workday against Okta disable timestamps. 16 within 24-hour SLA. 2 exceeded SLA (GitHub issue — see Finding 2).
Found 2 terminated employees with active GitHub access during collection. This became Finding 2. Evidence collected but documents the failure.

Pulled all SOX system provisioning tickets from Freshworks. Matched to Lumos approval records. 23 provisioning events. 21 had complete dual approval. 2 had manager-only approval (flagged for remediation).
Lumos approval workflow exports for all SOX provisioning events. Timestamped approval chains.
Pulled reconciliation PDFs from Finance team Drive folder. 3 months of reconciliation reports with reviewer signatures.
Screenshots of Drive file metadata showing upload dates and last-modified timestamps to prove timeliness.
Screenshots of VPC configurations for CDE account. Security group rules exported as JSON. 4 VPCs documented.
Annual pen test PDF from vendor. No screenshots needed — just filed the report. Easy one.
Screenshotted encryption settings for all 12 RDS instances across 3 AWS accounts. One per screenshot. Tedious but straightforward.
67 S3 buckets across 3 accounts. Scripted a partial export using AWS CLI but had to manually verify 15 buckets with non-standard encryption settings.
EBS volume encryption status exported via AWS CLI. 140 volumes. All encrypted. CLI output serves as evidence.
Qualys scan report export. PDF format. 3 critical and 7 high findings identified.
Matched 10 critical/high Qualys findings to Jira remediation tickets. Screenshots of ticket showing fix and deployment evidence. 3 findings still open at time of audit.
Exported IAM users with access to CDE resources across 2 AWS accounts. 9 users. Business justification documented manually in spreadsheet.
Stripe dashboard user list. 7 users with access. Screenshots of each user's role and last login.
Okta app assignment list for payment-related applications. Cross-referenced with Stripe user list.
CloudTrail configuration screenshots for CDE accounts. Multi-region trail enabled. S3 bucket destination confirmed.
CloudWatch alert rules for CDE account. Screenshots of 14 alert configurations. Sample of 5 triggered alerts with response documentation.
S3 lifecycle policy screenshot showing 12-month retention. CloudWatch log group retention settings confirmed.
RDS automated backup configuration screenshots. All 12 instances have daily backups enabled with 35-day retention.
Confluence pages documenting monthly restore tests. 3 months of test results. All successful. Screenshots of Confluence pages with timestamps.
S3 cross-region replication configuration for critical buckets. 8 buckets with replication rules documented.
Kandji compliance dashboard export. 312 macOS devices. 98.7% compliant. 4 non-compliant devices identified and remediation in progress.
Automox compliance report for FC Windows devices. 87 devices. 97.7% compliant. 2 non-compliant stations awaiting reimage.
CrowdStrike coverage report. Screenshots of deployment status. 399 endpoints covered. Coverage aligns with Kandji + Automox device counts.
Annual tabletop exercise conducted November 2025. Report in Google Docs. Exported as PDF. 12 participants. 4 action items identified.
Snowflake admin user list partially collected. Account admin roles documented. Need to verify service account ownership. Waiting on data engineering team response.
